titleZh: 机械除草势头减弱：农民投资信心不足拖累市场
summaryZh: 本文报道了农业机械化领域近期一系列重大变动：约翰迪尔关闭喷雾机制造商Mazzotti，德国喷雾机公司Dammann申请破产，雷肯关闭荷兰工厂并整合除草设备生产。核心原因是农民因缺乏信心而推迟投资，而非技术本身的问题。文章揭示了当前农业机械市场的低迷态势，对智慧畜牧行业关注自动化除草设备应用趋势具有参考价值。
featuredReason: 机械除草设备市场遇冷反映了农业自动化投资信心的波动，智慧畜牧从业者可从中洞察行业整体投资环境，为自身设备采购与技术路线选择提供参考。
contentFull: Mechanical weeding loses momentum 12-06 | Weed/Pest control | Expert opinion Bas Van Hattum Editor-in-chief TREKKERGerman machinery manufacturer Lemken recently announced that it will concentrate the production of hoeing machines and precision tine weeders at its site in Alpen, Germany. Photo: Koos GroenewoldManufacturers of sprayers, hoes and tine weeders are feeling the impact of farmers postponing investments. It is not the technology holding the market back, but a lack of confidence.In recent weeks, the mechanisation sector has seen a succession of striking announcements. John Deere has pulled the plug on sprayer manufacturer Mazzotti. German sprayer manufacturer Dammann has filed for insolvency, with the prospect of a restart. translationZh:
喷雾机、锄草机和弹齿除草机制造商正感受到农民推迟投资带来的冲击。阻碍市场的并非技术，而是信心的缺失。

近几周，机械化领域接连出现引人注目的公告。约翰迪尔已终止与喷雾机制造商Mazzotti的合作。德国喷雾机制造商Dammann已申请破产，但有望重启。雷肯正在关闭其位于荷兰丁特洛德的工厂，并将锄草机和精密弹齿除草机的生产集中到德国阿尔彭的基地。

author: Bas Van Hattum
contentHtml: Manufacturers of sprayers, hoes and tine weeders are feeling the impact of farmers postponing investments. It is not the technology holding the market back, but a lack of confidence.
